user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship (Souvenir Shopping)
fields.description: Large flagship store with a wide selection of Canadian souvenirs and gifts — clothing (toques, scarves), maple syrup, home goods, and branded items. Good spot to pick up last-minute presents before heading to CN Tower and the airport.
highlights: Convenient downtown location for quick shopping

insertion_point.reasoning: User asked for a souvenir stop in the morning before the CN Tower. Inserting at position 1 places this shopping stop after hotel breakfast (ends 8:15) and before the CN Tower EdgeWalk at 10:00, allowing time to shop and travel.
